name: AUBURN NATIONAL BANCORPORATION, INC
summary: Auburn National Bancorporation, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated bank holding company controlling AuburnBank, an Alabama state member bank founded in 1907. The Bank operates in East Alabama, primarily Lee County, offering checking, savings, certificates of deposit, residential mortgage lending, commercial and consumer loans, ATM services, Visa Checkcards, online banking, bill payment, and electronic banking services through 7 branches and a main office in Auburn, Opelika, Notasulga, and Valley, Alabama.
